---
title: "Business Data Analytics 3"
source: "Workshop Material"
author: "William Duncan"
institution: "University of Kansas"
competency: [Data Wrangling]
tech-lang: [R]
main-format: [PDF, Code, Data]
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Material Description

This is the third workshop of four is a series of workshops for business analytics.

## Module Materials

You can access the material [here](https://github.com/KansasData/Module/tree/main/ku_duncan_business3)

This Material is under the [CC BY license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/deed.en)
